name: BambooHR
description: Monitor employee records, onboarding/offboarding status, and HR compliance in BambooHR

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to BambooHR > profile icon > API Keys > Add New Key
2. Copy the API key
3. Encode it: run echo -n YOUR_API_KEY:x | base64
4. Enter the encoded result and your subdomain below

credentialFields.label: Encoded API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode your API key: run echo -n YOUR_API_KEY:x | base64

checks.name: Employee Verification
checks.description: Verifies that all active employees in BambooHR have required profile fields completed

checks.name: Employee Descriptions
checks.description: Verifies that active employees have job titles and department assignments documented
